descriptionChanges.existing: Cosmelan® by Mesoestetic The Cosmelan® Depigmentation System is a professional treatment combined with a homecare programme designed to visibly reduce pigmentation, melasma and dark spots while helping to prevent their recurrence. Its advanced formula works by regulating excess melanin production, leaving the skin brighter, smoother and more even in tone. In addition to correcting pigmentation, Cosmelan® helps improve overall skin texture, enhances radiance, refines pores and fights the visible signs of ageing by promoting healthier, more youthful-looking skin. Ideal for: Melasma Sun damage Post-inflammatory pigmentation (PIH) Uneven skin tone Dull skin Early signs of ageing
descriptionChanges.final: Cosmelan 2 is identified in the existing catalogue as part of Mesoestetic's Cosmelan home-care programme. It is intended to help improve the appearance of uneven pigmentation and dark spots as part of a professionally guided skincare routine. Contact Lullubelle for full product information and guidance.

descriptionChanges.existing: Cream that combines pure retinol and bakuchiol with an intensive regenerating and renewing action. Rejuvenates, brightens and revitalises skin. Intensive night cream to treat signs of ageing: - Irregular tone and loss of luminosity - Deep wrinkles and expression lines - Loss of skin density and elasticity Dermatologically tested formula. Backed by clinical and in vitro studies. After 28 days, our volunteers reported: - 50%+ reduction of wrinkles¹ - 70%+ better skin texture¹ Night cream with light texture, suitable for all skin types. The combination of pure retinol and bakuchiol maximises the formula's anti-ageing benefits and promotes an optimal balance in terms of tolerance. In addition, by incorporating our exclusive post-biotic complex, we reinforce the skin's renewal capacity while respecting and strengthening the skin microbiota. ¹In vitro studies demonstrated the efficacy in terms of cell renewal, with an acceleration in the regeneration rate 9.8 times higher.
descriptionChanges.final: Mesoestetic Skinretin 0,3% is a night cream containing retinol and bakuchiol. The existing catalogue information describes it as intended to support skin renewal and improve the appearance of uneven tone, loss of luminosity, lines and elasticity. Follow the product directions and consult the packaging or Lullubelle for full information.

descriptionChange.existing: Cosmelan® by Mesoestetic The Cosmelan® Depigmentation System is a professional treatment combined with a homecare programme designed to visibly reduce pigmentation, melasma and dark spots while helping to prevent their recurrence. Its advanced formula works by regulating excess melanin production, leaving the skin brighter, smoother and more even in tone. In addition to correcting pigmentation, Cosmelan® helps improve overall skin texture, enhances radiance, refines pores and fights the visible signs of ageing by promoting healthier, more youthful-looking skin. Ideal for: Melasma Sun damage Post-inflammatory pigmentation (PIH) Uneven skin tone Dull skin Early signs of ageing
